What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

International Board Certified Lactation Consultant (IBCLC), in-person lactation consult / virtual lactation consult, pre-baby prep & planning, I will provide you with a superbill to submit to your insurance company for reimbursement

Today ops snapshot Consult + visit board Parent record Intake + consult view Feeding cadence + weight check view Follow-up + class enrollment view Setup map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Every consult — in-home, virtual, or pre-baby prep — gets one record with intake, visit notes, and travel zone in one place.
  • Superbill status is tracked per parent so insurance-reimbursement follow-ups stop slipping through text and email.
  • Follow-up cadence (weight check, pumping check-in, tongue-tie referral) is queued on one timeline instead of re-booked one at a time in IntakeQ.
